case_title: CHUI YI TAM VS. JOHNNY GUAN

docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAM, CHUI YI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2014 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY TAM, CHUI YI AS TO DEFENDANT GUAN, JOHNNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-04-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-09-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-04-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-04-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---VIVIAN CHOY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAM, CHUI YI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUAN, JOHNNY $3,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,475.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GUAN, JOHNNY
